name: Waydev AI
long_description: Waydev tracks AI-generated code from commit to production. AI Checkpoints capture which agent wrote the code, tokens consumed, cost per PR, acceptance rate, and whether it deployed. Compare Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code on real production outcomes. Measure AI adoption by team, monthly spend, avg tokens per developer, and total tokens used. The Waydev Agent answers plain-English questions about your AI investment. Built for VPs of Engineering and CTOs. Trusted by Dropbox, American Express, Caterpillar, and PwC.
one_liner: Waydev: AI Adoption, AI Impact, and AI ROI for engineering teams
